channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The History of Conspiracy Theories Surrounding the Founding Fathers and Freemasonry
item.description: This article delves into the historical context surrounding Thomas Jefferson and the Freemasons, revealing how conspiracy theories plagued his reputation and political career. Beginning in the late 18...

item.title: Comelec Reports 3.7 Million Registered Voters for Upcoming Barangay and SK Elections
item.description: As of March 31, 2026, the Commission on Elections (Comelec) has received 3,697,800 applications for voter registration ahead of the May 12 barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) elections. Calabarzon ...

item.title: Infrastructure as Key to Strengthening Nigeria’s Security and National Cohesion
item.description: This article dey highlight say security for Nigeria no be only matter of police or military force. Dr. Lazarus Angbazo talk say infrastructure fit actually reduce insecurity if e properly deployed. E ...

item.title: Young Consultant Purchases First Condo in Vancouver Independently at Age 24
item.description: At just 24, Stephanie achieved what many consider nearly impossible: buying her first home in Vancouver, one of Canada’s most expensive cities, without financial assistance from her family. Now 25, sh...

item.title: Audit Reveals Poor Conditions in Kenya’s Correctional Facilities Despite Reforms
item.description: An audit by Auditor-General Nancy Gathungu has revealed serious issues within Kenya’s correctional facilities, highlighting the failure of the government to implement effective reforms in the penal sy...

item.title: US Officials Engage Pakistan Intermediaries as Trump Sets Deadline for Iran Deal
item.description: US President Donald Trump, on Monday, issued stern warnings to Iran, stating that the country could be neutralised in one night if it fails to reach an agreement with the United States by Tuesday nigh...

item.title: Megyn Kelly discusses the benefits of hormone replacement therapy for menopausal health
item.description: Megyn Kelly, aged 55, has openly shared her positive experience with hormone replacement therapy (HRT) during menopause, emphasising that there is no shame in ageing. Speaking on her SiriusXM show wit...

item.title: Former 'PBB Collab 2.0' housemates open up about fame and keeping life grounded
item.description: The article tackles the down-to-earth personalities of the former 'Pinoy Big Brother Collab 2.0' housemates, who proved that fame has not changed their humility and approach to life. Written by Liezel...

item.title: Lincoln City promoted to the Championship after 65 years
item.description: Lincoln City have achieved promotion to the Championship, marking their first return to the English second tier in 65 years. The decisive moment came with a thrilling 2-1 victory over Reading, secured...

item.title: Kerala Revises Its Position in Supreme Court Review of Sabarimala Entry Case
item.description: The Kerala government has shifted its stance in the long-standing controversy surrounding the Sabarimala temple entry issue. In its new submission to the Supreme Court during the review hearing, the s...

item.title: Federal Reserve weighs maintaining or raising rates amid inflation and oil price pressures
item.description: A senior official from the Federal Reserve, Beth Hammack, president of the Cleveland Fed, signalled Monday that an increase in the benchmark interest rate might be necessary if inflation continues to ...

item.title: Tinubu government begin ₦3.3 trillion plan to pay electricity sector debt and boost power supply
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don authorise one big ₦3.3 trillion payment plan wey go help clear old debts for Nigeria power sector. Di money dey meant to fix long-standing money wahala wey don disturb GenCos...

item.title: President Marcos Reports Only 29% of Local Government Units Achieved Seal of Good Governance in 2023
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. revealed that only 29 percent of Local Government Units (LGUs) in the Philippines managed to pass the Seal of Good Governance for the year 2023. The Seal of Good Governa...

item.title: Atiku urges Tinubu to take immediate action on recurring attacks across Nigeria
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don yan make President Bola Tinubu suppose stop di big big talk and begin serious work to protect lives after di recent killings wey don scatter for different stat...

item.title: Hamilton Man Revives Typewriter Culture, Encourages Intentional Writing
item.description: Jonathan Marshall, a Hamilton resident and typewriter enthusiast, has opened The Hamilton Typewriter Company, a unique shop and museum dedicated to the preservation and appreciation of typewriters. Af...

item.title: Hungary’s youth turn away from Orban amid growing discontent and emigration fears
item.description: As Hungary faces a decisive election, younger voters who grew up under Prime Minister Viktor Orban are increasingly supporting the opposition, with some considering emigration should Orban secure anot...

item.title: NBI questions completion claim of P92-million Pandi, Bulacan flood control project amid missing structures
item.description: A National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) official disclosed during former Senator Bong Revilla’s malversation case hearing that a flood control project in Pandi, Bulacan was reported as fully complete...

item.title: Ontario municipalities face $4B shortfall as local budgets strain under provincial program costs
item.description: Municipalities across Ontario say they can no longer afford to cover the escalating costs of provincial programs such as social services and health care. The Association of Municipalities of Ontario (...

item.title: Kat Borlongan, Filipina Chief Impact Officer at Contentsquare, Receives Knight of the National Order of Merit from France
item.description: A prominent Filipina technology leader, Kat Borlongan, has been honored by the French government with the prestigious Knight of the National Order of Merit. This recognition highlights her significant...

item.title: Farmers Increasing Productivity and Profits Through Sustainable Practices
item.description: Farming is a significant industry in Australia, contributing an estimated A$100 billion to the economy in 2026. However, the industry has been seen as a major emitter of greenhouse gases and a contrib...
